versions.changelog_entry: Initial remediation prompt for PR #94 code review. 19 items across CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW. Five CRITICAL: worker-exception swallowing in _run_isolated_author_jobs (parallel.py:411-417); non-atomic merge_parquet_metadata (parquet.py:73-92); per-author empty-filter fallback bug (per_author.py:322-326); NFKC simhash migration with version bump + CLI command + RUNBOOK note; incomplete _sync_patchable_globals propagation (orchestrator/__init__.py:36-46). Includes pre-flight, verification protocol, out-of-scope list, and definition-of-done.
